hero.heading: Learn from the Engineers Who Build Enterprise Systems
hero.subtitle: Skip the boilerplate tutorials. Upskill on cloud-native architecture, production-grade Kubernetes, infrastructure as code, and LLMOps with courses written and taught by active Xebia consultants.

features.title: Built for Architects & Developers
features.subtitle: Accelerate your career and engineering efficiency with standard-setting, hands-on learning resources.

items.title: Consultant-Led Curriculum
items.description: Learn from active Xebia principal consultants who solve complex cloud and DevOps challenges for Fortune 500 enterprises every day.

items.title: Zero-Setup Interactive Labs
items.description: Spin up real, pre-configured sandbox environments (AWS, GCP, Kubernetes) directly in your browser. No local installs, no security hurdles.

items.title: Production-Ready Patterns
items.description: Don't just pass tests. Master real gitops workflows, zero-trust cloud network policies, and robust infrastructure-as-code patterns.
